title: src/net/sourceforge/plantuml/security/SURL.java:294-307 - forbiddenURL()的IP检测正则过于宽松：`^https?://[-#.0
description: src/net/sourceforge/plantuml/security/SURL.java:294-307 - forbiddenURL()的IP检测正则过于宽松：`^https?://[-#.0-9:\[\]+]+/.*` 和 `^https?://[^.]+/.*` 可能被URL混淆绕过（如八进制IP、域名映射到127.0.0.1、短域名等形式）

title: src/net/sourceforge/plantuml/security/SecurityProfile.java:87-88 - LEGACY模式默认开启，无SSL限制，URL完全放行
description: src/net/sourceforge/plantuml/security/SecurityProfile.java:87-88 - LEGACY模式默认开启，无SSL限制，URL完全放行

title: Default LEGACY Security Profile Disables All SSRF Protections
description: The SecurityProfile.init() method defaults to LEGACY mode when no PLANTUML_SECURITY_PROFILE environment variable is set (line 122). In LEGACY mode, isUrlOk() returns true unconditionally (SURL.java line 225-226), completely bypassing forbiddenURL() and allowlist checks. This means all SSRF protections are opt-in rather than opt-out, and any deployment without explicit security configuration is vulnerable. The code comments even acknowledge this: 'This mode reproduce old PlantUML version behaviour... this will be removed from future version because it is now full secure, especially on Internet server'.
suggestion: Change the default security profile from LEGACY to INTERNET for server deployments, or ALLOWLIST for controlled environments. Document prominently that LEGACY mode will be removed and users must migrate. Add startup warnings when LEGACY mode is active.

title: Dangerous HTTP Request via User-Controlled URL
description: LoadJson.loadStringData()直接将用户提供的字符串作为URL传给SURL.create()，然后发起HTTP GET请求。由于只检查startsWith('http://')或startsWith('https://')，攻击者可控整个URL路径和参数，结合重定向绕过可实现完整的SSRF攻击链。

title: SSRF via URL Whitelist Bypass in forbiddenURL() - Multiple Encoding and DNS Bypass Vectors
description: The forbiddenURL() method (line 294-307) uses regex patterns to detect and block IP-based URLs. However, the patterns only cover standard dotted-decimal notation and simple hostnames. Multiple bypass techniques are possible: (1) Hex-encoded IPs like http://0x7f000001/ (equivalent to 127.0.0.1), (2) Decimal-encoded IPs like http://2130706433/, (3) DNS rebinding services like http://127.0.0.1.nip.io/ or http://localtest.me/, (4) IPv6-mapped IPv4 addresses like http://[::ffff:127.0.0.1]/. The check on line 300 (^https?://[-#.0-9:\\[\\]+]+/.*) only matches standard IPv4 octet notation and IPv6 bracket notation, missing all encoding bypasses.
suggestion: 1) After URL parsing, resolve the hostname to IP address using InetAddress.getByName() and check if the resolved IP is internal/private (use isLoopbackAddress(), isSiteLocalAddress(), isLinkLocalAddress()). 2) Additionally, block common DNS rebinding domains (nip.io, xip.io, sslip.io, localtest.me). 3) Consider normalizing the URL (decode hex/octal notation) before regex matching.

title: SSRF Entry Point via %load_json DSL Function - User-Controlled URL Directly Used for HTTP Request
description: The LoadJson.loadStringData() method at line 163-183 is the direct entry point for SSRF attacks. It receives a user-controlled 'path' parameter from the %load_json DSL function, checks only that it starts with 'http://' or 'https://', then passes it to SURL.create() and calls getBytes() to make the HTTP request. The user has complete control over the target URL. While SURL performs some validation, the redirect bypass vulnerability (Finding #1) makes this entry point exploitable.
suggestion: Consider implementing additional input validation before calling SURL.create(). Add domain allowlist if the use case supports it. Document the security implications clearly. Consider warning users when INTERNET or LEGACY profile is active.

title: SSRF via URL Whitelist Bypass in forbiddenURL()
description: forbiddenURL()使用多个正则表达式检测IP地址，但可能被绕过。例如`http://0x7f000001/`（十六进制127.0.0.1）、`http://127.0.0.1.nip.io/`等DNS rebinding技巧可绕过IP过滤。此外`isInUrlAllowList`的startswith匹配可能被前导路径欺骗。
